data.name: 囚笼少女
data.detailed_description:
This is a role-playing maze exploration game.

The player takes on the role of a white-collar worker named Aiko who is imprisoned in a maze by mysterious magic. Explore the intricate maze, avoid traps, collect key items, and gradually uncover the dark secrets behind the maze. Time is pressing. Behind every door, there might be hope or even deeper despair...

The game includes:

· A beautiful female lead

· Custom character costumes (stockings, high heels)

· A complex and intricate maze

· A wide variety of mechanisms and props

Could you help her escape?

data.short_description: After opening a mysterious email, beautiful office lady Aiko is pulled into a bizarre, endless maze. Filled with unknown magic and dangers, she must stay calm, search for clues, and solve puzzles to escape this invisible prison.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 俄文, 日文, 繁體中文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i5 9400f
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX960
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: win7/win8/win10
  • 處理器: i5 9600f
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX1080
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
